info.title: Masjid Baiturrahim API
info.description: REST API for the mosque management app. Responses use `{ success, data?, message?, error? }` (see handlers). **Admin** routes require JWT with `admin` role. This spec is maintained for documentation; refine schemas as needed.

tags.name: Gallery
tags.description: Foto kurasi untuk karusel beranda dan halaman /galeri (Konten → Galeri di dashboard)

get.description: Hanya item `is_published`; urut `sort_order`. Dipakai landing (karusel) dan GET publik /galeri.

post.description: JSON: `title` (wajib), `image_url` (wajib), `summary`, `link_url`, `sort_order`, `is_published`. Tanpa `sort_order`, backend menambahkan di akhir.
